title: Candle Holders Set of 3, Raised Dot Glass Candlestick Holders with Adhesive Wax, Green Reversible Taper & Tea Light Holder, Vintage Taper Candle Holder for Christmas Table Centrepiece Brithday
features: Suitable Size & Adhesive Wax: Including 3PCS glass candlestick holders and 25g specialty adhesive wax, each size is 2.6"W x 3.8"H, fit for 0.8" candles. The sticky wax ensures safe placement of candles and compatibility with various types of candles

Reversible 2-in-1 Design: Tea light candle holders offer dual functionality. Use as traditional candle holders, or flip them over to convert into tea light holders, accommodating various candle types like tea lights, pillar candles, and tapers

Premium Robust Material: The glass candle holder is crafted from thickened glass. It is sturdy and durable, resistant to breakage. Its smooth surface is easy to clean, maintaining a crystal-clear appearance and decorative appeal over time

Green & Embossed Dots: This dark green tealight holders features an embossed dot design. When lit, it emits a semi-transparent vintage glow, blending crystalline lustre with texture to add artistic flair to any space

Versatile Application: The green dinner candle holder creates an elegant, radiant atmosphere. Perfect for daily decor, it also adds a touch of charm to parties, dinners, Christmas, weddings, and other special occasions
description: Dark Green Embossed Candle Holders Set – A Vintage Feast of Light and Shadow Immerse yourself in the vintage ambiance created by these dark green glass candle holders adorned with embossed dots! When lit, the textured patterns cast dynamic shadows, infusing your personal space with an elegant and warm charm. Product Specifications: Product Name: Candle holder Pattern: Embossed Dots Material: Premium Glass Colour: Dark Green Quantity: 3 candle holders & 1 Box of Adhesive Wax Single Item Dimensions: 3.4cm × 6.5cm × 9.6cm Key Features: Dark Green Embossed Aesthetics: The dark green glass body features a 3D embossed dot design. When a candle is lit, light refracts through the semi-transparent glass, creating a crystalline glow where texture and light intertwine—making it a visual centrepiece for enhancing your home's atmosphere. Compact Size & Secure Accessories: This set includes 3 professionally designed candle holders and a 25g specialty adhesive wax for versatile use with various candle types. The wax ensures your candle sticks holder or tealight stays firmly in place for peace of mind. Reversible 2-in-1 Design: These versatile tealight holders feature a dual-sided structure. Use one side as a traditional dinner candle holder, then flip it over to instantly convert into a tea light holder, offering flexible use for different occasions. Versatile Application: Perfect as a table decoration for parties, dinners, Christmas, weddings, and more, these candle holders for candlestick candles inject charm into any space and reflect a refined taste for life. Note: Slight dimensional variations (±0.1cm) may occur due to manual craftsmanship. Please contact us immediately for any delivery damage or quality issues—we are committed to providing a satisfactory solution.
